name: cloudflare
description: Cloudflare integration — Workers, Durable Objects, and Wrangler build guides plus the official Cloudflare API MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Build on Cloudflare, with official skills & API MCP
interface.longDescription: Connect the official Cloudflare API MCP for token-efficient API access (docs/search/execute). Bundled with Cloudflare's official skills for building on Workers, Durable Objects, Agents, the Sandbox SDK, and Wrangler.
